testcase.name: generate scalar subquery in trigger update
trigger registration codegen mixed target and transition expression
trigger registration codegen complex delete where
trigger registration codegen old-table update mapping
trigger registration codegen after delete old-table mapping
trigger registration codegen before delete old-table binding
monetdb.a

failure.message: passed0 was false basic: Files: /var/folders/v9/nz3tpj_95ss_l8tkj3qsjvfh0000gn/T/translated_10179754817404255789.q, /var/folders/v9/nz3tpj_95ss_l8tkj3qsjvfh0000gn/T/kdb_5658914831995026223.q +(,`q95)!,,94.99247 +(,`q5)!,,4.997797 "assign" Failed to load:/var/folders/v9/nz3tpj_95ss_l8tkj3qsjvfh0000gn/T/kdb_5658914831995026223.q
